awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com is a defunct website dedicated to [[John Vervaeke]].<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20201022171055/https://awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com/</ref>

Its web archive reference can be found [https://web.archive.org/web/*/awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com* here]

It contained episode transcripts, links to summaries, and definitions.

Much of its content was completely lost due to improper archiving, but some of its content was preserved on the web archive. The preserved definitions have been preserved on this wiki too.

It is unknown who ran it.

== References ==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com]]{{lowercase}}[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
